articles.title: SAKANA AWARDED JAPANESE GOVERNMENT SUPERCOMPUTING GRANT
articles.summary: The Japanese-based AI startup has been chosen to access the NEDO-funded supercomputer.

articles.title: HUGGING FACE LAUNCHES OPEN SOURCE AI ASSISTANT MAKER TO RIVAL CUSTOM GPTS
articles.summary: Hugging Face has introduced customizable Hugging Chat Assistants. This allows for the free creation of AI chatbots using a selection of open-source LLMs and contrasts with OpenAI's subscription-based model.

articles.title: ARC IS BUILDING AN AI AGENT THAT BROWSES ON YOUR BEHALF
articles.summary: The Browser Company is developing AI technology for its Arc Browser to autonomously surf the web and present relevant information to users, unlike traditional search engines.

articles.title: GOOD ACTOR, BAD ACTOR: LLMS FOR FAKE NEWS DETECTION
articles.summary: A fine-tuned BERT model is better than an off-the-shelf LLM like GPT-3.5-turbo at fake news detection.

articles.title: EFFICIENT RECOMMENDATION SYSTEMS
articles.summary: PAP-REC has introduced a method to automatically create personalized prompts for Recommendation Language Models, enhancing their efficiency and effectiveness.

articles.title: AUDIO QUALITY ASSESSMENT WITH AI
articles.summary: PAM is a tool that uses Audio-Language Models to assess audio quality without reference tracks or specialized training.

articles.title: TECH TALK: HOW DATA AND AI DRIVE BUSINESS VALUE IN FINANCIAL SERVICES
articles.summary: Ramdas Naranyan, VP PM of Data Analytics and Insights Tech at Bank of America, joins Dave Mariani of AtScale [12]. They’ll discuss the various ways financial services firms use data to improve products, assess market opportunities, and select markets for expansion — as well as the role of AI [12] in personalization, and the need for

articles.title: scalable data infrastructure. Tune in live 🎧
PYGMALION INFERENCE ENGINE
articles.summary: The Aphrodite engine can be used to reduce VRAM requirements while boosting throughput for AI inference workloads.

articles.title: OPEN ALTERNATIVE TO GITHUB COPILOT
articles.summary: ChatLLM for VS Code is an open alternative for AI-assisted autocomplete. It now supports any Ollama models in addition to using closed API-based models.

articles.title: DIFFUSERS 0.26
articles.summary: Diffusers from Hugging Face has a number of interesting additions like video pipelines and multi-IP adapter usage, which allows conditioning on more than one image for generation.

articles.title: OLLAMA VISION MODELS
articles.summary: Ollama recently released support for vision models. Llava 1.6 features updated support and includes vision functionality in both Python and JavaScript packages.

articles.title: IMAGE TO MUSIC V2
articles.summary: You can create a compelling image-to-music pipeline by translating images to text, text to prompt, and prompt to music.

articles.title: HIGH-FIDELITY VIDEO GENERATION
articles.summary: AnimateLCM is a new approach for quickly creating high-quality videos and improving existing video diffusion models by splitting the learning process into two parts.

articles.title: A PRACTICAL GUIDE TO AI IN RECRUITING
articles.summary: Over 73% of companies are investing in AI and recruiting automation. This ebook covers the basic how-tos, ethical guidelines, and

articles.title: strategies to eliminate bias. Download free from Gem
BANANA SUNSETTING SERVERLESS GPU BUSINESS
articles.summary: Banana is winding down operations of its serverless GPU business. It has provided a transition plan and assistance for off-boarding.

articles.title: 3D TOPIA GENERATIVE MODEL
articles.summary: Powerful text to 3D generative model that uses a two-stage process to generate candidates and then refine those chosen.

articles.title: SELLSCALE (PRODUCT)
articles.summary: Get instant feedback on your sales emails.
